prompt: Why do agent benchmarks need diagnostics beyond a single success rate?
reference_answer: Agent benchmarks need diagnostics beyond a single success rate because one metric can hide serious failure modes. RAGEN-2 shows that entropy can look healthy while trajectories collapse into input-agnostic templates, ARLArena decomposes instability sources and studies collapse in larger interactive environments, and Tau-bench adds pass^k to measure repeated-trial reliability instead of a single run. Together they suggest that useful diagnostics must track collapse, stability, and consistency rather than only headline success.

documents.title: RAGEN-2 stability digest
documents.content: RAGEN-2 says recent multi-turn agentic RL treats stability as a first-class problem because long-horizon training can collapse. It identifies template collapse, where trajectories look diverse by entropy but become input-agnostic, and it proposes mutual information proxies plus SNR-aware filtering to diagnose and mitigate the problem.

documents.title: ARLArena digest
documents.content: ARLArena says agentic RL often leads to training collapse in larger environments and longer interaction horizons. It builds a standardized testbed, decomposes instability sources, and proposes SAMPO as a stable agentic policy optimization method.

documents.title: Tau-bench evaluation digest
documents.content: Tau-bench evaluates final outcomes by comparing the database state at the end of a conversation against an annotated goal state. It also proposes pass^k to measure reliability over repeated trials rather than a single run.

required_claims.text: RAGEN-2 shows that entropy can hide template collapse and uses mutual information proxies plus SNR-aware filtering as diagnostics.
ARLArena studies training collapse in larger interactive environments and decomposes instability sources.
Tau-bench adds pass^k to measure repeated-trial reliability instead of only a single-run success signal.
Together these benchmarks show that useful diagnostics must track collapse, stability, and consistency rather than only headline success.

provenance.refresh_hint: Refresh if stability diagnostics or repeated-trial reliability guidance changes materially in these projects.
notes: Intended to stress cross-cutting diagnostics synthesis rather than one-domain summarization.
